description: Phase 5 — Q4 Quantization. HF_EMBEDDINGS_DTYPE env var now selects ONNX variant (fp32 default, fp16, q4, q4f16, int8 etc). HfLocalProvider passes the resolved dtype to @huggingface/transformers.pipeline(). Standalone tests confirm fp32 (1.1s cold) and q4 (3.2s cold) both load EmbeddingGemma-300m-ONNX and produce 768-dim vectors. Recall benchmark deferred pending ground-truth queries. Default behavior unchanged (fp32).
